OrientalProsperityPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyWildOnTheWayFeature1: During any spin, some symbols (excluding Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) in reels 2, 3, 4 and/or 5 that occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces may have a silver frame around itself.
OrientalProsperityPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyWildOnTheWayFeature2: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any silver-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into a randomly selected symbol (other than Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) with a gold frame around itself.
OrientalProsperityPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyWildOnTheWayFeature3: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any gold-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into Wild symbol.
OrientalProsperityPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyScatterSymbolMultiplierFeature: During any main game spin, whenever 1 or more Scatter symbols appear on the reels, the win multiplier will be increased by 2 for each Scatter symbol before wins are paid.
OrientalProsperityPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature1: 4 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 8 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
OrientalProsperityPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the win multiplier is the same as the win multiplier from the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
OrientalProsperityPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature3: During any free spin, whenever 1 or more Scatter symbols appear on the reels, the win multiplier will be increased by 2 for each Scatter symbol before wins are paid. 1 free spin is also awarded for each Scatter symbol on the reels.
OrientalProsperityPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue1: Some symbols may occupy 2 to 4 symbol's spaces and each of these symbols will represent as a single symbol during payout calculations.
OrientalProsperityPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue2: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
OrientalProsperityPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue3: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.
OrientalProsperityPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
OrientalProsperityPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.

OrientalProsperityRules.GeneralRules1: Oriental Prosperity is a 6-reel, 5-row video slot (with an additional reel on top of reel 2, 3, 4 and 5) featuring Wilds-on-the-Way and Scatter symbols with multipliers.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{2025} ways - %{32400} ways, bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form. %{2025} and %{32400} are numbers that needs to be formatted
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 2,025 ways - 32,400 ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.05 to 50.

OrientalProsperityRules.GeneralRules3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
